Programs

FIND THE TRAINING
THAT FITS YOU.

Four coach-led programs built around real Lawnton locals — whether you want high-energy team training, semi-private coaching, or a structured environment for the kids. Browse below and book a free session in any one.

Most Popular
Team Training · Group Coaching

BOOTCAMP

The heartbeat of Knight Fitness. Coach-led group sessions built to get you fitter, stronger, and more consistent — without the guesswork of training alone. Real coaching, real community, real progress.

45 min Up to 15 / class All levels 8+ times daily
Explore Bootcamp → Book a free session
Best Results
Semi-Private Coaching · Men 30+

MEN'S CLUB

Built for blokes who are done mucking around. A clear plan, expert coaching, and a crew of guys who hold each other accountable — week in, week out. Personalised training for men who want more than a membership.

60 min 4–6 per coach Personal plan Weekly check-ins
Explore Men's Club → Book a free session
Best Results
Semi-Private Coaching · Women Only

WOMEN'S CLUB

A women-only training space where you'll build real strength, real confidence, and real habits — with coaches who actually know your name and your goals. Small-group coaching tailored to how women actually train and progress.

60 min 4–6 per coach Women only Mindset coaching
Explore Women's Club → Book a free session
Ages 10–17
Teen Training · Youth Athletic Development

YOUNG KNIGHTS

Structured strength and athletic development for kids and teens — built around safe technique, real coaching, and a positive environment they actually enjoy showing up to. Confidence, habits, and strength that last well beyond the gym.

45 min Ages 10–17 Coach-led After-school
Explore Young Knights → Contact us

NOT SURE WHICH ONE?

A quick side-by-side. If you're still on the fence, book a free session and a coach will help you choose.

BOOTCAMP

Best for momentum
  • Group energy & community
  • Most session times
  • Best value per session
  • Great for beginners

MEN'S CLUB

Best for men 30+
  • Personalised programming
  • Small-group coaching
  • Weekly check-ins
  • Real accountability

WOMEN'S CLUB

Best for women
  • Women-only environment
  • Personalised plan
  • Mindset & nutrition
  • Strong supportive crew

YOUNG KNIGHTS

Best for ages 10–17
  • Safe technique focus
  • Confidence & habits
  • After-school timing
  • Coach-led every rep

YOUR FIRST SESSION IS ON US.

Try any program free. Meet the coaches, train with the crew, and see why 350+ Lawnton locals keep showing up.

Claim My Free Session
No pressure · No contracts · A coach will be in touch within 24 hours.
